items.title: Ливанский Аун встретится с Трампом, поскольку усиливается давление с целью разоружения Хезболлы
items.original_title: Lebanon's Aoun to meet Trump as pressure builds to disarm Hezbollah
items.rss_summary:
Lebanese President Joseph Aoun is set to meet with his US counterpart Donald Trump in Washington on Tuesday, as pressure builds for Beirut to disarm Hezbollah, Israel's key condition before withdrawing from south Lebanon.
Aoun, who has staunchly criticised Hezbollah's decision to pull Lebanon into war, is now hoping Trump will further pressure Israel to withdraw from occupied Lebanese lands.
